title: The Geometry of Semantic Space: A Continuous Geometric Framework for the Transformer Architecture
innovation_summary: The Geometry of Semantic Space: A Continuous Geometric Framework for the Transformer Architecture: We present a continuous geometric framework that models the discrete algebraic operations of the Transformer architecture as an integro-differential equation (IDE) on a semantic fiber bundle.
